📍 Sydney, Australia | FDE @ Lyra

Ex-Tokopedia software engineer, now forward deployed engineer at Lyra.

## Projects

* [ATAT](https://github.com/gale2307/ATAT) - LLM-powered personal video transcriber and translator agentic system
